summary: Upstream F2P gate f2p_upstream_l2l3_data_usage was hard-coded to grep for 'get_optional_l2_l3_data', a symbol that does NOT appear in upstream PR #9446 — the gold patch uses '&item.router_data.l2_l3_data' field access instead. The gate was unreachable on the canonical patch (zero matches), capping the achievable upstream reward at 0.20 instead of 0.40. Broadened the regex to accept any of: get_optional_l2_l3_data, .l2_l3_data field access, or L2L3Data type reference — matches Gate D's inline regex which is already correct.
fixes_applied: test.sh: broadened upstream gate's grep to 'get_optional_l2_l3_data|\.l2_l3_data\b|L2L3Data' (mirrors inline Gate D)
test_manifest.yaml: updated description of f2p_upstream_l2l3_data_usage to reflect the broader pattern
p2p_regression_note: test.sh already uses the v043 fix: hard_zero=False (P2P_REGRESSION informational only). Verified.
f2p_quality: GOOD — 6 inline gates (processing field, L3 line-item struct, L2 order struct, l2_l3 accessor, processing populated from L2/L3 data, cargo check) plus 2 upstream gates (CheckoutProcessing struct, l2_l3 accessor). All behavioral.
